2605.18132.title: Who Generated This 3D Asset? Learning Source Attribution for Generative 3D Models
2605.18132.paper_summary: Generative 3D models are deployed in gaming, robotics, and immersive creation, making source attribution critical: given a 3D asset, can we identify whether and which generative model created it? This problem faces two core challenges: dispersed attribution signals, where 3D fingerprints are distributed across multi-view, geometric, and frequency-domain cues; and realistic deployment constraints, where scarce labels, degraded prompts, and mixed real/synthetic assets undermine attribution reliability. To systematically study this problem, we construct, to the best of our knowledge, the first passive source attribution benchmark for modern generated assets, covering 22 representative 3D generators under standard, few-shot, and realistic deployment protocols. Based on this benchmark, we find that generative 3D models leave two types of stable fingerprints: cross-view inconsistency and structural artifacts reflected in geometric statistics and frequency-domain cues. To capture these dispersed signals, we propose a hierarchical multi-view multi-modal Transformer that fuses appearance, geometric, and frequency-domain features within each view and models global relationships across views. Extensive experiments demonstrate strong performance, achieving 97.22% accuracy under full supervision and 77.17% accuracy with only 1% training data, corresponding to fewer than five samples per generator. These results show that modern 3D generators leave stable and attributable fingerprints, establishing a new benchmark and methodological foundation for trustworthy 3D content provenance.
2605.18132.paper_summary_zh: 生成的3D模型被應用於遊戲、機器人技術和沉浸式創作，使得來源歸屬變得至關重要：給定一個3D資產，我們能否識別出是哪些生成模型創造了它？這個問題面臨兩個核心挑戰：分散的歸屬信號，其中3D指紋分佈在多視角、幾何和頻域線索中；以及現實的部署限制，稀缺的標籤、退化的提示和混合的真實/合成資產削弱了歸屬的可靠性。為了系統性地研究這個問題，我們構建了截至目前為止，針對現代生成資產的首個被動來源歸屬基準，涵蓋22個代表性的3D生成器，並在標準、少量樣本和現實部署協議下進行測試。基於這個基準，我們發現生成的3D模型留下了兩種類型的穩定指紋：跨視角不一致性和反映在幾何統計和頻域線索中的結構性工件。為了捕捉這些分散的信號，我們提出了一種層次化的多視角多模態Transformer，該模型在每個視角中融合外觀、幾何和頻域特徵，並建模視角之間的全局關係。大量實驗顯示出強勁的性能，在完全監督下達到97.22%的準確率，而在僅用1%訓練數據的情況下達到77.17%的準確率，這相當於每個生成器少於五個樣本。這些結果顯示現代3D生成器留下了穩定且可歸屬的指紋，為可信的3D內容來源建立了一個新的基準和方法論基礎。
2605.18132.author: Sihan Ma et.al.
2605.18132.authors: Sihan Ma, Siyuan Liang, Dacheng Tao
